steps.title: Track the sentence's job
steps.content: The underlined sentence explains the likely route by which fish moved from Southeast Asian fisheries through Hong Kong-based firms to North American markets. The next sentence uses that route to claim that Chinese diaspora trade networks had multinational dimensions.

steps.title: Reject misread functions
steps.content: Choice A says the origin remains inconclusive, but the sentence names locations. Choice C describes excavation steps, which are not discussed. Choice D says the following sentence casts doubt, but it actually builds on the route. The answer is B.
